name: Wells Fargo Reflect

welcome_offer.description: No rewards — focused on 0% intro APR promotion.

earning_rates.category: No Rewards — Balance Transfer / 0% APR Card
earning_rates.notes: This is a 0% intro APR card, not a rewards card.

notes: 0% intro APR for 21 months from account opening on purchases and qualifying balance transfers. Balance transfer fee: 5% (minimum $5). After intro period: 17.49%, 23.99%, or 28.24% variable APR. Foreign transaction fee: 3%. Card is focused on debt consolidation and interest-free financing.
